eeoffsets.remarks: Number of rides since a trouble code was set
eeoffsets.name: Number of Rides since Error Set

eeoffsets.remarks: Julian date (day of year) of manufacture
eeoffsets.name: ECM Manufacturing Day

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum RPM indicating a running engine cranking otherwise)
eeoffsets.name: Engine Running Minimum RPM

eeoffsets.remarks: TPS voltage with a fully closed throttle, written on a TPS reset
eeoffsets.name: Throttle Position Sensor Reset Voltage

eeoffsets.remarks: TPS voltage difference from fully closed to WOT
eeoffsets.name: Throttle Position Sensor Voltage Range

eeoffsets.remarks: TPS degrees difference from fully closed to WOT
eeoffsets.name: Throttle Position Sensor Degrees Range

eeoffsets.remarks: TPS fraction used to detect TP changes
eeoffsets.name: Throttle Position Sensor Moving Average Fraction

eeoffsets.remarks: O2 sensor voltage indicating a rich mixture
eeoffsets.name: O2 Sensor Rich Voltage

eeoffsets.remarks: O2 sensor voltage indicating a lean mixture
eeoffsets.name: O2 Sensor Lean Voltage

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum RPM to activate O2 sensor
eeoffsets.name: Closed Loop Feature Minimum RPM

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum throttle to activate O2 sensor
eeoffsets.name: Closed Loop Feature Minimum Throttle

eeoffsets.remarks: TPS change indicating a light accel. condition
eeoffsets.name: Light Acceleration Condition

eeoffsets.remarks: Change in throttle movement indicationg a full acceleration condition
eeoffsets.name: Full Acceleration Condition

eeoffsets.remarks: Full acceleration enrichment duration in engine revs
eeoffsets.name: Acceleration Enrichment Duration

eeoffsets.remarks: Default fuel correction, applied to WOT regions
eeoffsets.name: WOT Enrichment

eeoffsets.remarks: Default fuel correction, applied to open loop regions
eeoffsets.name: Open Loop Default Correction

eeoffsets.remarks: Front cylinder fuel enrichment on engine temperature
eeoffsets.name: Front Cylinder Correction

eeoffsets.remarks: Engine temperature indicating a hot start condition
eeoffsets.name: Hot Start Condition

eeoffsets.remarks: Closed loop upper boundary throttle hysteresis
eeoffsets.name: Closed Loop Upper Boundary Load Hysteresis

eeoffsets.remarks: Closed loop lower boundary throttle hysteresis
eeoffsets.name: Closed Loop Lower Boundary Load Hysteresis

eeoffsets.remarks: Closed loop upper boundary RPM hysteresis
eeoffsets.name: Closed Loop Upper Boundary RPM Hysteresis

eeoffsets.remarks: Closed loop lower boundary RPM hysteresis
eeoffsets.name: Closed Loop Lower Boundary RPM Hysteresis

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of O2 sensor readings required to adjust AFV
eeoffsets.name: Calibration Mode Number of Readings

eeoffsets.remarks: Time between AFV writes to EEPROM
eeoffsets.name: AFV Storage Delay

eeoffsets.remarks: Maximum engine temperature to enable calibration mode
eeoffsets.name: Calibration Mode Maximum Engine Temperature

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum engine temperature to enable calibration mode
eeoffsets.name: Calibration Mode Minimum Engine Temperature

eeoffsets.remarks: PI controller high value RPM limit
eeoffsets.name: Fuel PI Controller High RPM Threshold

eeoffsets.remarks: PI controller high value throttle limit
eeoffsets.name: Fuel PI Controller High Throttle Threshold

eeoffsets.remarks: High P value used for PI controller
eeoffsets.name: Fuel PI Controller High P-Value

eeoffsets.remarks: High I value used for PI controller
eeoffsets.name: Fuel PI Controller High I-Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Low P value used for PI controller
eeoffsets.name: Fuel PI Controller Low P-Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Low I value used for PI controller
eeoffsets.name: Fuel PI Controller Low I-Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Idle P value used for PI controller
eeoffsets.name: Fuel PI Controller Idle P-Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Idle I value used for PI controller
eeoffsets.name: Fuel PI Controller Idle I-Value
Fuel Pulse Endpoint Table for Engine Temperature
Fuel Pulse Endpoint Table for Load

eeoffsets.remarks: Spark advance and fuel reduction configuration
eeoffsets.name: Spark Advance Retard Configuration

eeoffsets.remarks: RPM values for spark advance and fuel reduction
eeoffsets.name: Spark Advance Reduction RPM Axis

eeoffsets.remarks: The spark advance reduction while noise abatement is active
eeoffsets.name: Spark Advance Reduction

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of rides without error codes set to clear store errors
eeoffsets.name: Rides Required to Clear DTC

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of TPS read failures before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: Throttle Position Sensor Number of Errors
Throttle Position Sensor Highest Reading Allowed
Throttle Position Sensor Lowest Reading Allowed

eeoffsets.remarks: TPS default value set on failure
eeoffsets.name: Throttle Position Sensor Default Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum RPM to check for O2 activity
eeoffsets.name: O2 Sensor Test Minimum RPM

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum throttle to check for O2 activity
eeoffsets.name: O2 Sensor Test Minimum Throttle

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of O2 sensor read failures before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: O2 Sensor Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of inactive results before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: O2 Sensor Number of Inactive Reads

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of ET sensor read failures before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: Engine Temperature Sensor Number of Errors
Engine Temperature Sensor Highest Reading Allowed
Engine Temperature Sensor Lowest Reading Allowed

eeoffsets.remarks: ET sensor default value set on failure
eeoffsets.name: Engine Temperature Sensor Default Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Maximum allowed air temperature sensor reading
eeoffsets.name: Air Temperature Sensor Highest Reading Allowed

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum allowed air temperature sensor reading
eeoffsets.name: Air Temperature Sensor Lowest Reading Allowed

eeoffsets.remarks: Air temperature sensor default value, set on failure
eeoffsets.name: Air Temperature Sensor Default Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of air temperature sensor test failures before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: Air Temperature Sensor Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of battery voltage test failures before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: Battery Voltage Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Battery voltage default value, set on failure
eeoffsets.name: Battery Voltage Default Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of injector feedback test failures before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: Injector Feedback Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of failed coil feedback tests before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: Coil Feedback Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Off time before fuel pump feedback checked
eeoffsets.name: Fuel Pump Feedback Off Time before Test

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of fuelpump feedback test failures before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: Fuel Pump Feedback Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of tacho feedback test failures before error code is set
eeoffsets.name: Tacho Feedback Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Bank angle sensor tip-over value (alternative: shifter minimum delay between activations)
eeoffsets.name: Bank Angle Sensor Tip-Over Value

eeoffsets.remarks: Minimum bank angles sensor reading allowed (alternative: shifter debounce period)
eeoffsets.name: Bank Angle Sensor Lowest Reading Allowed

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of bank angle sensor test failures before error code is set (alternative: shifter fuel cut duration)
eeoffsets.name: Bank Angle Sensor Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Bank angle sensor tip-over detection delay (alternative: shifter maximum input activation value)
eeoffsets.name: Bank Angle Sensor Tipover Delay

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of failed A/D conversion tests before error code set
eeoffsets.name: AD-Converter Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of failed EEPROM checksum tests before error code set
eeoffsets.name: EEPROM Test Number of Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of revs without sync detected before error code set
eeoffsets.name: Camshaft Sensor Number of Sync Errors

eeoffsets.remarks: Number of consecutive out-of-sync revs before error code set
eeoffsets.name: Camshaft Sensor Test Number of Consecutive Sync Errors

bits.bit7: TPS too high/short to supply voltage
bits.bit2: Eng. Temp. Voltg. too high/short to ground
bits.bit8: Cooling fan 1 (rear or right) short to ground
bits.bit1: Eng. Temp. Voltg. too low/broken wire
bits.name: Error Mask Byte 0

bits.bit8: Air Temperature too high/short to ground
bits.bit1: Coil 1 short to ground or open
bits.name: Error Mask Byte 1

bits.bit2: Tachometer output short to supply voltage
bits.bit4: Fuel pump short to supply voltage
bits.name: Error Mask Byte 2
Error Mask Byte 3
bits.bit6: Fan 1 (rear or right) short to supply voltage

bits.bit7: TPS too high/short to supply voltage
bits.bit2: Engine Temperature too high/short to ground
bits.bit8: Cooling fan 1 (rear or right) short to ground
bits.name: Stored Errors Byte 0

bits.bit8: Air Temperature too high/short to ground
bits.bit1: Coil 1 short to ground or open
bits.name: Stored Errors Byte 1

bits.bit2: Tachometer output short to supply voltage
bits.bit4: Fuel pump short to supply voltage
bits.name: Stored Errors Byte 2
Stored Errors Byte 3
bits.bit6: Fan 1 (rear or right) short to supply voltage

bits.bit1: Idle spark and fuel adjustment enabled
bits.name: System Configuration
bits.bit6: Enable fuel pump duty cycle lookup

bits.bit3: Activate only if accel and WOT
bits.name: Spark Advance Reduction Configuration

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 0
bitnames.text: Eng. Temp. Voltg. too low/broken wire

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 0
bitnames.text: Eng. Temp. Voltg. too high/short to ground

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 0
bitnames.text: TPS too high/short to supply voltage

bitnames.name: Error Mask Byte 0

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 0
bitnames.text: Engine Temperature too high/short to ground

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 0
bitnames.text: TPS too high/short to supply voltage

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 0

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 1
bitnames.text: Coil 1 short to ground or open

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 1
bitnames.text: Air Temperature too high/short to ground

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 2

bitnames.name: Stored Errors Byte 3

bitnames.name: System Configuration
bitnames.text: Idle spark and fuel adjustment enabled

bitnames.name: System Configuration
bitnames.text: Enable fuel pump duty cycle lookup

bitnames.name: Spark Advance Reduction Configuration
bitnames.text: Activate only if accel and WOT
